items.name_en: 🔥New Paseo small dumpling bag🔥Nappa leather creates a lazy yet sophisticated vibe💥Paseo features exquisite craftsmanship and a simple, elegant silhouette🌹Combines beauty and practicality, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear; capacity is also great🌷French elegance, modern style, and sweet-cool style all work; the handle passes through the bag body, bringing a unique soft and ultra-light pleated structure💄"Paseo" is the new form of the L0💋ewe dumpling bag this season! The most frequently seen handbag on the runway is named "Paseo"👜Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful style💄The bag features a streamlined look, resembling a dumpling⭐️The handle is a drawstring design, continuing the knotted buckle elements of the Flamenco series; top zipper closure, reinforced with circular stitching at the bottom🌞Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and soft🎁Size: 35~21~11.5CM

The most frequently seen handbag on the runway is named "Paseo"👜Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful style💄The bag features a streamlined look, resembling a dumpling⭐️The handle is a drawstring design, continuing the knotted buckle elements of the Flamenco series; top zipper closure, reinforced with circular stitching at the bottom🌞Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and soft🎁Size: 35~21~11.5CM

items.name_en: 🔥New Version Geometric Mini Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Imported Nappa Calfskin💥Outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the bag a casual and lazy style.*Shoulder, Crossbody, or Handheld*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle*Zipper closure, articulated zipper pull*One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Detachable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice*Rectangular metal studs*💄This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin*The Mini Puzzle can fit for example a large wallet👛All sizes of phones📱and sunglasses🕶Carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle*Detachable💙💚

items.name_en: 🔥New🆕Medium Deer Leather Flamenco Purse Handbag 👜Celebrity Style. The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with a signature knot on the side. This medium size is made of deer leather 🥰*Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Detachable donut ⛓chain decorated with 💚Anagram Pebble *🧸Ultra-light, soft, and scratch-resistant, easy to match. Comes with two shoulder straps, suitable for single shoulder or crossbody. Magnetic closure*Suede lining* LOE💎WE Silver Plated 🎁

items.name_cn:
🔥Raffia Weave Black/Gold
This newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacations and play. It features a raffia weave with a mesh texture and a cutout style that creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect, while also adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm

items.name_en: 🔥The denim embroidery series is very popular. Denim elements are completely timeless, and they look super stylish no matter how you style them. This shoulder bag is simple and sharp, with the metal accents perfectly embellished. A summer bestseller. Model: M95050, Size: 26x15x9cm

items.name_en: 🔥With full original green box packaging🔥【New】This small Gucci Horsebit 1955 shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, paired with double-ring and rectangular designs, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with patent leather.
items.name_cn:
🔥With full original green box packaging🔥【New】This small Gucci Horsebit 1955 shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, paired with double-ring and rectangular designs, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with patent leather.
Black patent leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front features horsebit details
Sides feature half-horsebit details
Interior: Two main compartments and one zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap (height 28cm - 50cm); length adjustable from 71cm to 114cm
Flip-top closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 26cm (W) x 17.5cm (H) x 10cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🔮🔮🔮OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ⛓️. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm
